scripts.build:f3: pnpm --filter @sembridge/core --filter @sembridge/mapper run build && pnpm run build:f3:cyclic
scripts.build:f3:cyclic: pnpm --filter @sembridge/routing exec tsup --format esm --no-dts && pnpm --filter @sembridge/gateway exec tsup --format esm --no-dts && pnpm run build:f3:dts:bootstrap && pnpm run build:f3:dts:bundle
scripts.build:f3:dts:bootstrap: pnpm --filter @sembridge/routing exec tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false --declaration --declarationDir dist || true; pnpm --filter @sembridge/gateway exec tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false --declaration --declarationDir dist || true
scripts.build:f3:dts:bundle: find packages/routing/dist -name '*.d.ts' -delete; find packages/routing/dist -name '*.d.ts.map' -delete; pnpm --filter @sembridge/routing exec tsup --dts-only --no-clean && find packages/gateway/dist -name '*.d.ts' -delete; find packages/gateway/dist -name '*.d.ts.map' -delete; pnpm --filter @sembridge/gateway exec tsup --dts-only --no-clean
scripts.ci:gate:f3: pnpm ci:publint && pnpm ci:attw && pnpm ci:size
